description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 10th; Slot head; Price 26,000 gp; Weight 3 lbs. DESCRIPTION This oily bronze helm is fashioned in the shape of a frogâs head. Three times per day as a swift action, the helm fires an unerring tongue of force at a visible target within 20 feet. If the target is an unattended object weighing 250 pounds or less, it is pulled 20 feet toward the wearer. If the target is a creature of the wearerâs size or smaller, the wearer may make a combat maneuver check as a free action to pull the target 20 feet toward him. If the target is a creature larger than the wearer, an unattended object weighing more than 250 pounds, or an immobile structure such as a wall, the wearer is pulled 20 feet toward the target. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity, and the object or creature stops if the movement would move it into a solid object or creature. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, telekinesis; Cost 13,000 gp.
